sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112732" key="fu/ssa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φύσσ-α</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φυσσ-αλλίς</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φυσσ-αλός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φυσσ-ητήρ</orth>, etc., incorrect forms for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φῦσα,</foreign> etc.</entryFree>
